title: A.2 end-to-end visual debugger smoke test (capture + scan + matrix + gap)
goal: Run the full visual-debugger pipeline end-to-end on the live KERNEL-004 app build: capture a matrix of scenarios, scan each for console errors, diff against baselines, emit a HBR_VIS_GAP receipt on any unreachable surface, and pair the run with the focus-audit + injection-test from cluster A.4. Smoke test confirms the whole A.2 stack is live and integrated with A.4 quiet-mode guarantees.
expected_diff_shape: New top-level Playwright spec tests/visual/a2_smoke.spec.ts orchestrating MT-021..MT-026 in one run; new gov-check sub-check that runs the smoke during CI; receipts directory populated under .GOV/visual_baselines/ and .GOV/runtime/visual_receipts/ for the run.
unblock_conditions: All A.2 building blocks merged; MT-015 focus-audit so the smoke test asserts zero handshake-owned foreground transitions during the run.
implementation_notes: The smoke test is the end-to-end wire test for HBR-VIS-001/002/003/005 as a unit. Flow: (1) Launch Handshake in quiet mode (MT-014); (2) Connect Playwright via CDP (MT-021); (3) Start focus-audit (MT-015) with run_id = <smoke_run_id>; (4) Walk the capture matrix (MT-023) for the three required scenarios (normal viewport, constrained viewport, one edge state); (5) For each capture, pair console-error scan (MT-022) and DOM snapshot (MT-024); (6) On any drift, emit HBR_VIS_REGRESSION (MT-023); on any surface gap, emit HBR_VIS_GAP (MT-026); (7) Stop focus-audit and assert handshake_owned_events is empty (MT-015); (8) Output a smoke report JSONL `{ scenarios_run, drifts_detected, gaps_detected, console_errors_seen, focus_audit_summary, total_duration_ms }`. The Node helper `hbr-visual-smoke.mjs` is the gov-check sub-check; it spawns the Playwright run, captures its output, and exits 0 only when all four conditions hold: zero drifts, zero gaps (or all gaps have open_blockers entries), zero console errors, zero handshake-owned foreground transitions. Justfile: add `hbr-visual-smoke` recipe and wire into gov-check umbrella. Per HBR-VIS-001 evidence_kind=gui_drive_with_screenshot_capture this is THE wire test that demonstrates the whole visual stack works.
proof_commands: cd app && pnpm exec playwright test tests/visual/a2_smoke.spec.ts
risk_if_missed: Without the smoke, individual A.2 MTs prove pieces but not integration; a regression that breaks the chain ships green.
validator_focus: Smoke fails loudly on any of the four conditions; focus-audit assertion ties A.2 visual work to A.4 quiet-mode guarantees; the smoke report JSONL is human-readable for forensic review.

minimum_controls: Smoke fails on ANY of the four conditions (not aggregated).
Focus-audit assertion at smoke level ties A.2 work to A.4 invariants.
Smoke report JSONL is structured (machine-readable) for post-hoc forensics.
